title: CONSULT-II CHECKING SYSTEM

figures_detected.description: NISSAN CONSULT-II unit (item 1) and program card (item 2)
CONSULT-II Data Link Connector location showing DDL-2 connector (Petrol & Diesel engine models) and DDL-1 connector (Diesel engine models only)

content_blocks.text: When ordering the below equipment, contact your NISSAN distributor.

rows.tool_name:
NISSAN CONSULT-II
① CONSULT-II unit and accessories
② Program card AED00A and AEN00A (For NATS)
To confirm the best combination of tester internal software and the above mentioned software, refer to CONSULT-II Operation Manual.

content_blocks.text:
NOTE:
• The CONSULT-II must be used in conjunction with a program card. CONSULT-II does not require loading (Initialization) procedure.
• Be sure the CONSULT-II is turned off before installing or removing a program card.

content_blocks.description: CONSULT-II Data Link Connector location in vehicle

callouts.label: DDL-2 connector (Petrol & Diesel engine models) — Petrol: all available systems — Diesel: ABS, airbag
callouts.position: upper left area of connector diagram

callouts.label: DDL-1 connector (Diesel engine models only) Diesel: NATS

content_blocks.text: If the CONSULT-II cannot diagnose the system properly, check the following items.

rows.check_item:
• CONSULT-II DLC power supply circuit (Terminal 8) and ground circuit (Terminal 4) (For detailed circuit, refer to EF&EC-7251, "MI & Data Link Connectors Wiring Diagram".)
• CONSULT-II DDL cable

rows.symptom: CONSULT-II cannot access individual system. (Other systems can be accessed.)
rows.check_item:
• CONSULT-II program card (Check the approprite CONSULT-II program card for the system. Refer to "Checking Equipment" above.)
• Power supply and ground circuit for the control unite of the system (For detailed circuit, refer to wiring diagram for each system.)
• Open or short circuit between the system and CONSULT-II DLC (For detailed circuit, refer to wiring diagram for each system.)

tools_referenced.name: CONSULT-II Program Card
tools_referenced.usage: Used with NISSAN CONSULT-II for system diagnosis

tools_referenced.name: CONSULT-II Program Card (For NATS)
tools_referenced.usage: Used with NISSAN CONSULT-II for NATS system diagnosis

model_notes: DDL-2 connector: Petrol & Diesel engine models (Petrol: all available systems; Diesel: ABS, airbag). DDL-1 connector: Diesel engine models only (Diesel: NATS).
